tagline: Tampa Bay's Premier Pool Service Provider

hero.headline: Your Family's Pool Deserves Family Care
hero.subheadline: Tampa's trusted family-owned pool service keeping hundreds of pools crystal clear since 2017. We treat every pool like it's our own — backed by our 48-hour satisfaction guarantee.
checkmarks: 100% satisfaction guarantee or we fix it in 48 hours
Serving Tampa Bay families for over 9 years
No contracts — stay because you love the service

services.headline: Pool Services Tailored to Your Needs
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to emergency rescues, we handle every aspect of pool care so you can enjoy a sparkling pool without the hassle.

items.title: Weekly Pool Service
items.description: Complete weekly maintenance including water balancing, debris removal, brushing, vacuuming, and chemical testing to keep your pool swim-ready year-round.

items.title: Green to Clean
items.description: Pool gone green? Our professional shock treatments and deep cleaning restore even the most neglected pools back to pristine, swimmable condition.

items.title: One-Time Deep Cleaning
items.description: A comprehensive refresh including chemical balancing, tile scrubbing, and full equipment checks — perfect before a party or after a long absence.

items.title: Pool Inspections
items.description: Thorough assessment of your equipment, water chemistry, and overall pool health to catch small issues before they become expensive repairs.

items.title: Pool School
items.description: Hands-on training sessions where we teach you water chemistry, equipment operation, and cleaning techniques so you can confidently maintain your own pool.

items.title: Pool Leak Detection
items.description: Expert identification and pinpointing of hidden leaks in pool shells, plumbing, or filtration systems using professional-grade detection methods.

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Assessment
steps.description: Call or fill out our form and we'll set up a convenient time to evaluate your pool's current condition and needs.

steps.title: Get Your Custom Plan
steps.description: We'll recommend the ideal service plan based on your pool's size, condition, and your family's usage — no upsells, just honest advice.

steps.title: Enjoy a Sparkling Pool
steps.description: Sit back and relax while our team keeps your pool crystal clear. You'll wonder why you didn't call us sooner.

about.label: About Civic's Pool Service
about.headline: A Family Business That Treats Your Pool Like Our Own
about.description: Since 2017, Civic's Pool Service has been the go-to pool maintenance team for Tampa Bay homeowners. As a family-owned and operated company, we bring a personal touch that big corporations simply can't match. We've built our reputation one pool at a time — earning 4.9 stars from families across Tampa, Westchase, Oldsmar, and beyond. Our promise is simple: if you're not 100% satisfied, we'll fix it within 48 hours.

features.title: Family-Owned & Personal
features.description: We're a family business that treats every pool like it's our own — you'll see the same friendly faces each visit.

features.title: 48-Hour Satisfaction Guarantee
features.description: Not 100% satisfied? We'll come back and fix it within 48 hours at no charge. That's our promise to you.

features.title: Licensed, Insured & BBB Listed
features.description: Fully licensed and insured with BBB recognition. Your property and our team are always protected.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing, No Surprises
pricing.subtitle: Every pool is different. Contact us for a free personalized quote based on your pool's size, condition, and service needs. No contracts required.

guarantee.headline: Our 48-Hour Satisfaction Guarantee
guarantee.description: We stand behind every visit. If you're not 100% satisfied with our service, contact us and we'll come back to make it right within 48 hours — completely free. That's the Civic's Pool Service promise.

faqs.question: What areas do you service in Tampa Bay?
faqs.answer: We proudly serve Tampa, Westchase, Oldsmar, Citrus Park, Dunedin, Safety Harbor, and surrounding Tampa Bay communities. If you're unsure whether we cover your area, just give us a call!

faqs.question: Do I need to sign a long-term contract?
faqs.answer: No contracts required. We believe you should stay with us because you love the service, not because you're locked in. You can cancel anytime with no penalties.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start service?
faqs.answer: Most new customers are scheduled within 3-5 business days of their initial assessment. For urgent needs like green pool cleanups, we often accommodate same-week service.

faqs.question: What's included in your weekly pool service?
faqs.answer: Our weekly service includes skimming, brushing walls and tile, vacuuming, emptying baskets, testing and balancing water chemistry, inspecting equipment, and a detailed service report after every visit.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Civic's Pool Service is fully licensed and insured, and we're a BBB listed business. Your property and our team are always protected.

testimonials.name: Samantha J.
testimonials.text: Civic's Pool Service has been a game-changer for my pool maintenance. They're reliable, thorough, and my pool has never looked better!

testimonials.name: James B.
testimonials.text: Consistently delivered outstanding maintenance and repairs for my pool. I highly recommend their services to any Tampa homeowner.

testimonials.name: Joe H.
testimonials.text: Best pool service in Tampa — always on time and keeps our pool sparkling! The family atmosphere really shows in their work.

contact.headline: Ready for a Hassle-Free Pool?
contact.subtitle: Get your free pool assessment and see why hundreds of Tampa families trust Civic's Pool Service.
